parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "{{ $json.kling_prompt }}, keep clothing exactly as in <image:0>, refer the background vibe from <image:0> but not exactly like it. Maintain natural skin textures and keep the exact skin texture and micro-texture as in <image:1>. Make sure to have at least one face in the image.",
  "image_urls": {{ $json.image_urls.toJsonString() }},
  "elements": [{}],
  "resolution": "2K",
  "result_type": "single",
  "num_images": 1,
  "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
  "output_format": "png"
}

nodes.name: Update Status = image_generated
nodes.notes: Marks reel as image_generated on success, then continues to next reel.

documentId.cachedResultName: Short Video Generation DB- Jass Records

json.ClothingDetails: <<Avatar2_Male>> is wearing a dark navy blue puffer jacket over a grey wool turtleneck, black cargo trekking pants, and brown hiking boots. <<Avatar1_Female>> is dressed in a vibrant mustard yellow windbreaker, a maroon knitted scarf, black thermal leggings, and hiking boots.
json.LocationDetails: The scene transitions between a high-altitude mountain pass with snowy ridges, a rocky riverbank beside a turquoise Beas river, and a rustic roadside wooden tea stall decorated with colorful prayer flags.
json.MasterShot: A breathtaking cinematic vista of the Himachal Pradesh mountains featuring snow-capped peaks and lush green valleys. <<Avatar2_Male>> and <<Avatar1_Female>> are seen standing together at a panoramic viewpoint, wearing trekking gear and carrying light backpacks, looking out over the majestic landscape of the Himalayas.

StoryShots.cameraAndActionPrompt: A slow, sweeping wide-angle drone shot moving horizontally from left to right, capturing the vastness of the mountains while the avatars remain still, gazing forward.
StoryShots.framePrompt: A cinematic wide shot of the majestic snow-capped Himalayan peaks. <<Avatar2_Male>> and <<Avatar1_Female>> are standing at the edge of a cliff, looking at the horizon in awe of the massive mountains. Dont change the face of <<Avatar2_Male>> keep it same. Dont change the face of <<Avatar1_Female>> keep it same.

StoryShots.cameraAndActionPrompt: Mid-level camera height with a slight handheld jitter to simulate a natural walking feel, following the gaze of the characters toward the river.
StoryShots.framePrompt: A mid shot from eyeline at the riverbank. <<Avatar2_Male>> points toward the rushing turquoise water of the river while <<Avatar1_Female>> watches with a smile. The rocky terrain and splashing water are visible in the background. Dont change the face of <<Avatar2_Male>> keep it same. Dont change the face of <<Avatar1_Female>> keep it same.

StoryShots.cameraAndActionPrompt: Static OTS shot with a focus on the steam rising from the cup, utilizing a shallow depth of field to blur the background mountains.
StoryShots.framePrompt: An over-the-shoulder (OTS) shot from behind <<Avatar2_Male>> looking at <<Avatar1_Female>>. They are sitting at a wooden bench of a roadside stall. <<Avatar1_Female>> is holding a steaming clay cup of chai, blowing gently on the steam. Dont change the face of <<Avatar2_Male>> keep it same. Dont change the face of <<Avatar1_Female>> keep it same.

StoryShots.cameraAndActionPrompt: Extreme closeup with a very subtle slow-motion zoom-in to emphasize the facial expression and the warmth of the lighting.
StoryShots.framePrompt: A closeup of emotions focusing on <<Avatar2_Male>>. He is laughing heartily while the golden hour sunlight illuminates his face, reflecting the pure joy of the travel. The mountain range is a soft blur behind him. Dont change the face of <<Avatar2_Male>> keep it same. Dont change the face of <<Avatar1_Female>> keep it same.

StoryShots.cameraAndActionPrompt: Low angle camera placement tilted upwards, performing a slow vertical tilt-up movement from the avatars toward the tops of the pine trees.
StoryShots.framePrompt: A low angle shot looking up at <<Avatar2_Male>> and <<Avatar1_Female>> as they sit on a large grey boulder. Above them, tall pine trees stretch toward a clear blue sky. They are both looking up at the canopy. Dont change the face of <<Avatar2_Male>> keep it same. Dont change the face of <<Avatar1_Female>> keep it same.
